LIMITED SCOPE REPRESENTATION BY CATHERINE DANIELSON AND PATTY PRICE FOR DEFENDANT ANNETTE MICHEAUX
FRANK MICHEAUX NOT PRESENT.

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD. CASE SETTLED. TRIAL DATE OFF CALENDAR.
TERMS OF SETTLEMENT PLACED ON RECORD AS FOLLOWS: ANNETTE MICHEAUX AUTHORIZED TO REPRESENT HUSBAND FRANK MICHEAUX WHO IS CAUGHT IN TRAFFIC. PARTIES AGREED TO DISMISS CASE WITHOUT PREJUDICE.
